title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-28
body:
Today's moderation review addressed 3 high-severity reports:

• spam_wave_42 — BANNED. User posted phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes.
• toxic_runner — BANNED. User engaged in repeated targeted harassment of newcomers.
• core_maintainer (report_006) — NO ACTION. Report confirmed as a false positive resulting from coordinated brigading following a legitimate moderation decision.

All three reports are now closed. Medium and low-severity reports (dispute, suspicious automation, formatting) remain under standard review. We remain committed to keeping this community safe and welcoming.
